definition:
1. with genitive pers. to estrange from , τῶν σωμάτων τὴν πόλιν (Thucydides) 
2. with dative pers. to make hostile to  another, τὴν χώραν τοῖς πολεμίοις (Xenophon Historicus):—;Pass. to be made an enemy , τινι (Thucydides) 
3. in Pass. of things, to be alienated, fall into other hands , (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
